title: Discord Chat Logger
description: Connects your Minecraft chat to Discord using webhooks
body:
# This plugin connects and sycncs your chat with discord using webhooks.
## Follow this quide to learn how to create a discord webhook:
Webhooks in Discord allow you to automate messages and data updates to your Discord channels. Here's how you can create one:
- Open Discord and navigate to the server where you want to create the webhook.
- Go to Server Settings by clicking on the server name at the top of the channel list
- Select Integrations from the sidebar.
- Click on Webhooks and then click on Create Webhook.
- Customize the Webhook by giving it a name, selecting a channel, and optionally uploading an avatar.

    Copy the Webhook URL for use in your applications.
## To cofigure the plugin
Go to the config.yml and put your webhook url in, then restart the server.
Now you can see your minecraft chat, in the discord channel where you created the webhook

## Note: This is a one way, which means discord messages won't show up in minecraft.
